name: chain__service_fulfillment_sops__purpose
method: # Service Fulfillment SOPs  **Purpose:** Step-by-step checklists for delivering all 8 PRINTMAXX services. Use these to train VAs or execute yourself.  **Philosophy:** Under-promise, over-deliver. Ship

stages.task: Match inbound lead to one of 8 service types from FREELANCE_PIPELINE_ACTIVE.csv
Load correct SOP checklist, generate timeline and deliverable list for client
Generate proactive client update emails at each milestone
